purpose: RC-WS9.2 anti-recurrence trigger. An empty bead queue is a Goodhart proxy: zero open work does not mean the project vision is delivered. This contract documents the automated trigger that fires when the bead queue empties so the swarm cannot silently resolve an empty queue to a 'done' state. The trigger is satisfied only by a reality-check attestation pinned to the current commit and queue state, so a stale or pre-existing attestation cannot discharge a fresh empty-queue condition.

queue_empty_definition.rationale: Open and in_progress beads are the only states that represent outstanding work. A queue with zero of both is 'empty' and triggers the mandatory reality check.

trigger.name: queue_empty_mandatory_reality_check
trigger.satisfied_by: a reality-check attestation in the ledger whose source_commit equals the current HEAD and whose queue_state_hash equals the current empty-queue hash

trigger_states.queue_not_empty: outstanding work remains; the trigger is dormant; the gate passes
trigger_states.reality_check_required: the queue is empty and no matching attestation exists; the trigger has fired and the mandatory reality check is outstanding; the gate fails under --gate
trigger_states.reality_check_satisfied: the queue is empty and a commit-and-state-pinned attestation exists; the gate passes and the milestone becomes eligible for the WS-9.3 sequential stopping rule

freshness.rationale: A stale attestation from an earlier commit, or one recorded against a different queue state, cannot satisfy a new empty-queue condition. This is the WS-0 no-stale-evidence rule applied to queue-empty closure.

queue_state_hash.preimage: newline-joined sorted 'id\tstatus' rows for every active (open or in_progress) bead

modes.--validate-only: validate this contract and run the embedded negative-control self-tests; the live queue trigger state is reported but does not drive the exit code
modes.--gate: live enforcement: additionally exit non-zero when the live queue is empty and the mandatory reality check is unsatisfied
modes.--attest: append a well-formed reality-check attestation pinned to the current HEAD and queue state

exit_codes.0: --validate-only with a valid contract and passing self-tests, or --gate with queue_not_empty or reality_check_satisfied, or a successful --attest
exit_codes.1: a contract or self-test failure, or --gate with reality_check_required

validation_commands: bash scripts/check_queue_empty_reality_check.sh --validate-only | jq -e '(.trigger_state | type == "string") and (.queue_empty | type == "boolean") and (.trigger_fired | type == "boolean") and (.active_bead_count | type == "number") and (.queue_empty_resolves_to_done == false) and (.recommended_next_action.decision | type == "string")'
